description.content: Brand catalog and information
Retrieves the list of gift card brands available to your account, including brand metadata, supported denominations, transaction types, and currency information.

query.description: Filter by ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g., GB, US)
Filter by ISO 4217 currency code (e.g., GBP, USD)

Digital gift card issuance
Synchronously issues a digital gift card for a specific brand and denomination. Returns a gift card code or URL immediately.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

Asynchronously orders a digital gift card. Used for brands that require asynchronous processing. Returns a status and order reference.

Physical gift card operations
Order management and status
Asynchronously orders a digital gift card. Used for brands that require asynchronous processing. Returns a status and order reference.

Cancels a pending or errored gift card order.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Refunds a completed gift card order. Funds are returned to the float.

Balance checking operations
Checks the remaining balance on a specific gift card. Only available for brands that support balance_check in their transaction_types.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Float account management
Retrieves real-time balance of float accounts and pending payment transfers.

Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

The Tillo Gift Card API enables businesses to issue digital and physical gift cards from 4,000+ global brands across 37 markets and 16 currencies. Supports synchronous and asynchronous card issuance, balance checking, stock checking, refunds, order status, float management, and brand catalog access. Authentication uses HMAC-SHA256 signatures.
